text:
Ascendant
will have an emaciated body, be timid, will have a face, akin to that of a deer, be troubled by
windy diseases, will have a bright and elevated nose, be not mighty, will have many sons, be
hairy-bodied, will have broad feet and hands, be devoid of conduct and virtues, be tormented
by thirst (or morbid heat), be dear to the fair sex, will wander in hills and forests, be valorous,
will have knowledge of Shastras, Vedas, fine arts, music and musical instruments, will have
little strength, be a householder, be hostile, wicked, ill disposed to relatives, splendourous,
will have a wicked wife, will not be a talebearer, be wealthy, virtuous, will serve a king, be
very liberal, happy and fortunate.
42-45. EFFECTS OF BIRTH IN AQUARIUS ASCENDANT.
One born in Aquarius Ascendant will indulge in mean acts, be principal among the men of his
race, be foolish, will have blown and sharp nose, be base, irascible, indolent, inclined to
